exercises.hindiScript: सेब सेहत के लिए अच्छा है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.

exercises.hindiScript: संतरे में विटामिन सी होता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Guava is a cheap and nutritious fruit.
The sunflower turns towards the sun.

exercises.hindiScript: अंगूर छोटे और मीठे होते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I like a garden of flowers.
The jasmine's fragrance is very nice.

exercises.hindiScript: तरबूज गर्मियों में ठंडक देता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Fresh fruits are available in the market.
Marigold flowers are used in worship.

exercises.hindiScript: पपीता पाचन के लिए अच्छा है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The lily is white in colour.

options: Guava is a cheap and nutritious fruit.

exercises.audioScript: I like a garden of flowers.

options: I like a garden of flowers.

exercises.audioScript: Fresh fruits are available in the market.
exercises.hindiScript: बाजार में ताजे फल मिलते हैं।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Fresh fruits are available in the market.
exercises.answer: Fresh fruits are available in the market.

dictationPassage.text: Apple is good for health. Orange contains vitamin C. Grapes are small and sweet. Watermelon gives coolness in summer. Papaya is good for digestion.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: सेब सेहत के लिए अच्छा है। संतरे में विटामिन सी होता है। अंगूर छोटे और मीठे होते हैं। तरबूज गर्मियों में ठंडक देता है। पपीता पाचन के लिए अच्छा है।
